title: More Minerals
description: This mod add more minerals (tools and armors included) to your game, and it add also a new dimension.
body:
# NEW MINERALS
- Void Pearl  
- Ruby  
- Sapphire  
- Topaz  
- Malachite  

# NEW TOOLS & ARMOR  
Add tools and armor sets for each newly added mineral.

# NEW DIMENSION  
Introduce a new Void Dimension, accessible through a standard portal made of Void Blocks. The portal must be activated using a Void Rock.  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**SPOILER** — You can enter it through the real void. — **SPOILER**

</details>  

This dimension features a unique dark biome with structures similar to the End. It also contains an extremely rare structure that offers a special challenge for the player.
